Class Neo4jManagedTypes

java.lang.Object
org.springframework.data.neo4j.aot.Neo4jManagedTypes
All Implemented Interfaces:
ManagedTypes
public final class Neo4jManagedTypes extends Object implements ManagedTypes
The set of types managed by Neo4j.
Since:
7.0.0
Author:
Gerrit Meier

  • Method Details

    • from

      public static Neo4jManagedTypes from(ManagedTypes managedTypes)
      Wraps an existing ManagedTypes object with Neo4jManagedTypes.
      Parameters:
      managedTypes - existing types to be wrapped
      Returns:
      new instance of Neo4jManagedTypes initialized from an existing set of managed types

    • from

      public static Neo4jManagedTypes from(Class<?>... types)
      Factory method used to construct Neo4jManagedTypes from the given array of types.
      Parameters:
      types - array of types used to initialize the ManagedTypes; must not be null
      Returns:
      new instance of Neo4jManagedTypes initialized from types

    • fromIterable

      public static Neo4jManagedTypes fromIterable(Iterable<? extends Class<?>> types)
      Factory method used to construct Neo4jManagedTypes from the given, required Iterable of types.
      Parameters:
      types - Iterable of types used to initialize the ManagedTypes; must not be null.
      Returns:
      new instance of Neo4jManagedTypes initialized the given, required Iterable of types.

    • empty

      public static Neo4jManagedTypes empty()
      Factory method to return an empty Neo4jManagedTypes object.
      Returns:
      an empty Neo4jManagedTypes object.

    • forEach

      public void forEach(Consumer<Class<?>> action)
      Specified by:
      forEach in interface ManagedTypes
